name: Agilent Technologies, Inc.
h1: Agilent Technologies's GCC footprint in India
lede: Agilent Technologies runs seven capability centers across five Indian cities. Ahmedabad, Manesar, Bengaluru, Mumbai and Hyderabad, covering CoE, gbs, it and R&D, built over 25 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Agilent Technologies office in India. We map seven, across five cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Agilent Technologies GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Agilent Technologies runs 7 verified GCC centers across 5 Indian cities (Ahmedabad, Manesar, Bengaluru, Mumbai, Hyderabad), covering CoE, gbs, it and R&D. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: Associate Vice President, IT - SAP Services & Digital Integration

about.description: Agilent Technologies's India footprint covers Ahmedabad, Manesar, Bengaluru, Mumbai and Hyderabad, spanning CoE, gbs, it and R&D. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.
about.industry: Scientific Instrument - Life Sciences, Scientific Instrument Manufacturing

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all twenty decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many GCC centers does Agilent Technologies operate in India?
faq.a: Agilent Technologies operates 7 active Global Capability Center sites in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Agilent Technologies have GCC centers in?
faq.a: Agilent Technologies's India GCC footprint spans Ahmedabad, Manesar, Bengaluru, Mumbai and Hyderabad.

faq.q: What types of GCC centers does Agilent Technologies run in India?
faq.a: Agilent Technologies runs CoE, gbs, it and R&D centers in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Agilent Technologies's India GCCs?
faq.a: Agilent Technologies's India centers employ in the 1,000 to 5,000 range. The exact aggregate and the headcount at each site are in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Agilent Technologies's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks 20 leaders at Agilent Technologies's India centers, across Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
